content.fact_text: Production-ready Redis infrastructure client implemented with ioredis, Opossum circuit breaker, and Zod configuration validation. Supports cluster and standalone configurations.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a production-ready Redis client with circuit breaking, cluster/standalone support, and observability. Manages lifecycle events and exposes standardized cache operations for the inventory/catalog services.
interfaces: get<T>(key: string, correlationId?: string): Promise<T | null>
set(key: string, value: any, ttlSeconds?: number, correlationId?: string): Promise<void>
hset(key: string, field: string, value: any, correlationId?: string): Promise<void>
hget<T>(key: string, field: string, correlationId?: string): Promise<T | null>
evalScript<T>(script: string, keys: string[], args: any[], correlationId?: string): Promise<T>
getHealth(): Promise<{ status: string; latency: number }>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a robust, production-ready interface for interacting with Redis, featuring automatic fault-tolerance, connection management, and structured error handling.
